Scratch — perfectly tied boats share a rank; next boat gets rank after both

RRS A8.1: When boats finish simultaneously they share the averaged points for the places they occupy. RRS A8.2: If no tie-break procedure separates two boats, they share the same rank. The next boat below them is assigned the rank after both tied boats. Alice and Bob cross the line together in every race (equal sortOrder at position 2, with no boat recorded at position 1). Under RRS A8.1 they occupy fleet ranks 1 and 2, each scoring (1+2)/2 = 1.5 per race. Carol is third in fleet (position 4 → fleet rank 3) scoring 3 per race. Their series scores are identical so no tie-break (RRS A8.2) can separate them; they share rank 1. Carol gets rank 3 (not rank 2).

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Alice and Bob cross the line together in every race (tied at position 2, fleet ranks 1 & 2).
Each scores (1+2)/2 = 1.5 per race. Carol is 3rd in fleet (position 4 → rank 3) scoring 3.

Alice: 1.5, 1.5 → 3 pts total
Bob:   1.5, 1.5 → 3 pts total  ← unresolvable tie with Alice
Carol: 3,   3   → 6 pts total

Expected: Alice and Bob both get rank 1. Carol gets rank 3 (not rank 2).
Rank Sail Helm R1 R2 Total
1st 101 Alice 1.5 1.5 3
1st 202 Bob 1.5 1.5 3
3rd 303 Carol 3 3 6

R1 — 1 Jan 2025

Rank Sail Helm Points
1= 101 Alice 1.5
1= 202 Bob 1.5
3 303 Carol 3

R2 — 1 Jan 2025

Rank Sail Helm Points
1= 101 Alice 1.5
1= 202 Bob 1.5
3 303 Carol 3
